# dfa-jump-threading crashing with "Assertion `Idx >= 0 && "Invalid basic block argument to remove!"' failed"

**Author:** mikaelholmen
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/160250
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** crash, llvm:transforms, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-10-01T14:06:10Z

## Body

llvm commit: 2ab02b6f561d
Reproduce with:
```opt -passes="dfa-jump-threading" bbi-110818.ll -o /dev/null```
Result:
```
opt: ../include/llvm/IR/Instructions.h:2795: Value *llvm::PHINode::removeIncomingValue(const BasicBlock *, bool): Assertion `Idx >= 0 && "Invalid basic block argument to remove!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
```

## Comments

### Comment 1 - mikaelholmen

This crash seems to be related to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/96127 and the fix (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/109511) for a crash I reported on that PR in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/96127#issuecomment-2324800391
